debug_info.goal:
S : Type
rule : RelInt S
n : ℕ
f : Fin n → List (RelInt S)
⊢ rule ∈ Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelInt.liftFinf S n f → ∃ i j, rule = (f i).get j

proof:
intro h
        unfold liftFinf at h
        rw [List.mem_flatten] at h
        obtain ⟨l, hl, hrul⟩ := h
        rw [List.mem_map] at hl
        obtain ⟨i, _, rfl⟩ := hl
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := List.mem_iff_get.mp hrul
        exact ⟨i, j, hj.symm⟩
failed_attempts:
simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hRule⟩ := h
        exists i
        have hIdx := List.get_of_mem hRule
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := hIdx
        exists j
        exact hj.symm

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hRule⟩ := h
        exact ⟨i, ⟨l.indexOf rule, List.indexOf_lt_length.mpr hRule⟩, (List.get_indexOf hRule).symm⟩

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hmem⟩ := h
        exists i
        have hlen : rule ∈ f i := hmem
        rw [List.mem_iff_get] at hlen
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := hlen
        exists j

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hrul⟩ := h
        exists i
        have := List.mem_iff_get.mp hrul
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := this
        exists j

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hrule⟩ := h
        exists i
        have := List.mem_iff_get.mp hrule
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := this
        exists j

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hrule⟩ := h
        exists i
        have := List.mem_iff_get.mp hrule
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := this
        exists j
        exact hj.symm

subst hi_eq
        have h_idx := List.mem_iff_get.mp h_rule
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := h_idx
        exact ⟨i, j, hj.symm⟩

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hrule⟩ := h
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := List.get_of_mem hrule
        exact ⟨i, j, hj.symm⟩

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hrule⟩ := h
        exists i
        have hlen := List.mem_iff_get.mp hrule
        obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := hlen
        exists j
        exact hj.symm

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hmem⟩ := h
        have hlen : rule ∈ f i := hmem
        have ⟨j, hj⟩ := List.get_of_mem hlen
        exact ⟨i, j, hj.symm⟩

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
        obtain ⟨l, ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩, hmem⟩ := h
        have hlen := List.indexOf_lt_length.mpr hmem
        refine ⟨i, ⟨(f i).indexOf rule, hlen⟩, ?_⟩
        exact (List.get_indexOf hmem).symm

simp only [liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map] at h
